cases.prompt: Create a premium fashion ecommerce navbar. Layout: Logo centered. Left side: Women, Men, Accessories. Right side: Search icon, Wishlist icon, Cart icon, Account icon. Cart: on hover show mini-cart dropdown aligned right edge with product image, name, size, quantity selector, remove button, subtotal, View Cart and Checkout buttons. Account: if logged out show Login/Register; if logged in show dropdown with Profile, Orders, Addresses, Logout. Make navbar transparent over hero and solid white after scroll.
Create a minimal ecommerce navbar. Logo left, collections in center, cart and sign in on right.
